name: viral_pattern_research
description: Linkup-backed research over real, currently high-engagement X posts/threads relevant to a client's space, extracting STRUCTURAL patterns only (hook style, format, length band) — never the source post's content, claims, or numbers. Output entries are permanently ineligible to carry a claim_status field; they are shapes to draft against, not evidence. Enforces the non-negotiable guardrail in policy.md: borrowing a hook/format shape is fine, borrowing clickbait's habit of vague urgency or fabricated stats is not.

client_id.description: Client this pattern research is scoped to.

topic_space.description: Client's icp/brand_pillars-derived topic space to search within.

content_pillars.description: Client's ClientBrandMemory.content_pillars, used to scope which post formats are worth studying for this client's actual post types.

min_engagement_threshold.description: Minimum engagement signal (platform-defined composite) a source post must clear to be considered 'proven to gain traction'.

viral_pattern_findings.description: Structure-only findings. A returned entry carrying a claim_status field is a defect in the tool implementation, not a valid output.
